name: agent-toolkit
description: Monorepo for the agent-toolkit set — three distribution targets share one OpenAPI core: standalone openapi-mcp CLI (npm), agent-toolkit Claude Code plugin (marketplace), agent-toolkit opencode plugin (git URL or npm). v0.3 surface is openapi-only; journal / mysql / notion / spec-pact / pr-watch domains live on archive/pre-openapi-only-slim.
author: Minjun Kim
